title: Matar Paneer

subs.name: firm tofu for a dairy-free version; do not simmer longer than 3 minutes
frozen corn kernels or diced carrots for a different but equally good result
2 tbsp thick coconut milk for a lighter, dairy-free option
ghee for a more aromatic finish, or extra oil for a vegan result

steps.text: Heat oil and butter together in a kadai over medium flame. Add the cumin seeds, bay leaf, cardamom and cloves; let them crackle for 30 seconds. Add the chopped onion and fry until golden, about 7 minutes.

Add the ginger-garlic paste and cook until the raw smell disappears, about 2 minutes. Add the tomatoes with a pinch of salt; cook, pressing them down, until they fully break down and oil separates at the sides — about 6 minutes.
Lower the flame. Add red chilli powder, turmeric and coriander powder; stir briskly for 30 seconds. Add 100 ml hot water and stir the masala into a smooth, thick sauce.
Add the green peas and simmer for 5 minutes until the peas are just tender. If using frozen peas, 3 minutes is enough.
Add the paneer cubes, stir gently to coat, and simmer on low flame for 5 more minutes. The paneer will absorb the masala; avoid boiling hard or it toughens.
Stir in the garam masala and cream if using. Taste for salt, garnish with coriander and serve with roti, naan or rice.

cross_contact_notes: Ingredient metadata cannot prove an allergen-free kitchen. Check packaged labels and cross-contact statements for your products.
trust.provenance_summary: AI-assisted original draft; declared licence original.
trust.substitution_warning: A substitution can introduce allergens or change dietary suitability. Never claim a swap is safe without checking the replacement's label and the user's allergy context.

substitution_notes: paneer → firm tofu for a dairy-free version; do not simmer longer than 3 minutes; peas → frozen corn kernels or diced carrots for a different but equally good result; cream → 2 tbsp thick coconut milk for a lighter, dairy-free option; butter → ghee for a more aromatic finish, or extra oil for a vegan result
